title: ARCHIVED – Notice – 2015 National Call for Proposals is Open - Canada.ca
content:
## ARCHIVED – Notice – 2015 National Call for Proposals is Open

## We have archived this page and will not be updating it.
You can use it for research or reference.

## We have archived this page and will not be updating it.
You can use it for research or reference.
Settlement, Resettlement Assistance and Inter-Action (Multiculturalism) programs accepting submissions.
Ottawa, June 22, 2015 –Organizations and individuals are now able to access the applications portal for the Settlement, Resettlement Assistance and Inter-Action (Multiculturalism) programs’ 2015 National Call for Proposals.
The application portal opens today, June 22, 2015 at 8:00:00 a.m. EDT and closes August 10, 2015 at 11:59:59 p.m. EDT. Funding from CIC will be available for projects of up to three years in duration and that begin on or after April 1, 2016.
The submission window will be open for a longer period than in the past to allow organizations to reach out to new partners and develop new projects that will expand the reach of Settlement, Resettlement Assistance and Inter-Action (Multiculturalism) programming.
Please consult the 2015 National Call for Proposals webpage for more information including funding guidelines, frequently asked questions and an applicant tutorial, as well as more information about the kinds of services and projects the Settlement, Resettlement Assistance and Inter-Action (Multiculturalism) Programs are seeking through the 2015 National Call for Proposals.
